_comment: Slice-specific property canonicalization table for books-p0-v1. Maps relation surface strings and alternate property IDs to a single canonical property ID, and declares inverse pairs so that both directions of a series-ordering edge (P155/P156) collapse to one stable triplet key. Canonical direction rule: for an inverse pair, the lower-numbered property ID is canonical (P155 < P156). See SPEC-text 4.3(B) and src/ivg_kg/grounding/link.py.

inverse_pairs._note: P156 (followed by) is the non-canonical direction; canonical is P155 (follows). Rule: lower-numbered PID is canonical. To canonicalize a P156 triple (A, P156, B), swap subject and object and replace property with P155: result is (B, P155, A).
